message:
🌱 Add k8up: unexpected status code 200 while pushing to pushgateway mission (#1070)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "k8up-106-unexpected-status-code-200-while-pushing-to-pushgateway",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "k8up: unexpected status code 200 while pushing to pushgateway",
+    "description": "unexpected status code 200 while pushing to pushgateway. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current k8up deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your k8up version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n k8up -l app.kubernetes.io/name=k8up\nhelm list -n k8up 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working k8up installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review k8up configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant k8up configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n k8up -l app.kubernetes.io/name=k8up\nkubectl get configmap -n k8up -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=k8up\n```\nhi\nI use k8up v0.1.10 and wrestic v.0.2.0.\nThe backup job throws an error when the backup-job pushes to the prometheus pushgateway:\n\n```\nI0813 23:02:09.739192       1 handler.go:44] wrestic/statsHandler/promStats \"level\"=0 \"msg\"=\"sending prometheus"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for unexpected status code 200 while pushing to pushgateway",
+        "description": "Hi  \n\nFinally had some time to get to this.\n\nA simple update of the prometheus libraries in wrestic solves the issues.\n\n```\n0902 15:26:06.819188   22487 handler.go:44] wrestic/statsHandler/promStats \"level\"=0 \"msg\"=\"sending prometheus stats\"  \"url\"=\"http://localhost:9091/\"\nI0902 15:26:06.838591  \n```yaml\nI0813 23:02:09.739192       1 handler.go:44] wrestic/statsHandler/promStats \"level\"=0 \"msg\"=\"sending prometheus stats\"  \"url\"=\"https://pushgateway.example.com\"\nE0813 23:02:09.741696       1 backup.go:145] wrestic \"msg\"=\"prometheus send failed\" \"error\"=\"unexpected status code 200 while pushing to https://pushgateway.example.com/metrics/job/restic_backup/instance/backup: \"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n k8up -l app.kubernetes.io/name=k8up\nkubectl get events -n k8up --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"unexpected status code 200 while pushing to pushgateway\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hi  \n\nFinally had some time to get to this.\n\nA simple update of the prometheus libraries in wrestic solves the issues.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "I0813 23:02:09.739192       1 handler.go:44] wrestic/statsHandler/promStats \"level\"=0 \"msg\"=\"sending prometheus stats\"  \"url\"=\"https://pushgateway.example.com\"\nE0813 23:02:09.741696       1 backup.go:145] wrestic \"msg\"=\"prometheus send failed\" \"error\"=\"unexpected status code 200 while pushing to https://pushgateway.example.com/metrics/job/restic_backup/instance/backup: \"",
+        "0902 15:26:06.819188   22487 handler.go:44] wrestic/statsHandler/promStats \"level\"=0 \"msg\"=\"sending prometheus stats\"  \"url\"=\"http://localhost:9091/\"\nI0902 15:26:06.838591   22487 backup.go:86] wrestic/backup \"level\"=0 \"msg\"=\"backup finished, sending snapshot list\"  \nI0902 15:26:06.838612   22487 snapshots.go:37] wrestic/snapshots \"level\"=0 \"msg\"=\"getting list of snapshots\"  \nI0902 15:26:07.423279   22487 handler.go:68] wrestic/statsHandler/webhookStats \"level\"=0 \"msg\"=\"sending webhooks\"  \"url\"=\"http://localhost:8091\"",
+        "I0927 23:02:10.242398       1 handler.go:44] wrestic/statsHandler/promStats \"level\"=0 \"msg\"=\"sending prometheus stats\"  \"url\"=\"http://prometheus-pushgateway.monitoring.svc.cluster.local:9091\"\nI0927 23:02:10.259513       1 backup.go:86] wrestic/backup \"level\"=0 \"msg\"=\"backup finished, sending snapshot list\"  \nI0927 23:02:10.259549       1 snapshots.go:37] wrestic/snapshots \"level\"=0 \"msg\"=\"getting list of snapshots\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "k8up",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },

+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-14T06:35:00.645Z",
